{{Quote|Nasrabi keeps it clean, runs some honest games.|[[Neeta]]|<ref name="IDC">''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''</ref>}}
'''Mussat Nasrabi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who served aboard the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] cruise liner, the ''[[Starlite Cloud]]'', as chief [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]]. It was here that he became good friends with the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]].<ref name="IDC" />

He later found work on a [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] processor in the heart of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], and was able to siphon off some of the gas to his own processing facility. From there, he supplied Okeefe and other smugglers for a tidy profit. With this, Nasrabi was able to hire [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] to run his processor while he moved on to bigger projects.<ref name="IDC" />

Nasrabi then established a small but high-class casino, called [[The Floating Fish]]. Tastefully decorated, it had polarized windows to provide privacy for its clients. Nasrabi decorated the casino with a number of globes hanging from the ceiling filled with live fish, a nod to his own culture. Nasbari was known to run the casino well, gaining a reputation for a clean, honest establishment. The casino provided games of all sorts, including [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] and [[Trin sticks]].<ref name="IDC" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] Okeefe made a run out to Bespin to pick up some tibanna from Nasrabi. He was pleased to help her out; especially since a run a year before to [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] had gone wrong. However, [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Birket]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] was aware of the deal and set [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] on Okeefe's trail. Okeefe eventually managed to beat them, and made the transfer with Nasrabi.<ref name="IDC" />

It is likely Mussat was related to [[Amira Nasrabi]], the Mon Calamari proprietor of the [[Illuminated Aquean]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]] in the [[Vaynai Archipelago]].<ref name="GMR">{{GamerCite|8|The Vaynai Archipelago}}</ref>
